migrationGoal: Run the same project stack on Aliyun, Volcengine, or Tencent Cloud with Docker Compose plus a thin host Nginx layer.

containerPlan.notes: Keep as the last migration item because it owns the root route.

currentRuntime.notionSync: Node cron path in repo, optional runtime

containerPlan.notes: Keep /aicrew/ basePath and websocket proxy semantics.

containerPlan.target: compose services: dm-web, dm-api, optional dm-tekton-bridge
containerPlan.notes: Keep auth cookie gate, webhook timeout, package upload/shared volumes.

sharedHostConcerns: Host Nginx owns TLS, auth cookie checks, and route fan-out.
Compose services should bind to 127.0.0.1 host ports unless intentionally public.
Secrets stay in remote env files or cloud secret stores, never in repo.
Cutover should be route-by-route: start container on a new local port, health check, switch Nginx, keep PM2 rollback path.
